briefing: Market was neutral today — NASDAQ barely positive at +0.2% while S&P 500 slipped -0.3%, a mixed divergence that does not meet the risk-on threshold for deploying cash. Strategy memory is explicit: do not force buys on neutral days just to deploy idle capital. Cash stays at $677 waiting for a genuine risk-on signal (NASDAQ +2%+ day) before entering any of the high-scoring candidates like HUT, CORZ, or ANET.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Index divergence occurs when two major stock indices — like the NASDAQ and S&P 500 — move in opposite directions on the same day. It typically signals sector rotation, where investors are selling some types of stocks (e.g. industrials) while buying others (e.g. tech), rather than a broad market move up or down. A divergent day without a clear directional trend is called 'neutral' and is often a reason to hold cash rather than put new money to work.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 指數背離是指那斯達克與標普500等主要股市指數在同一天出現方向相反的走勢。這通常意味著市場出現板塊輪動——投資者賣出某些類型的股票（如工業股），同時買入另一些（如科技股），而非整體市場的上漲或下跌。這種缺乏明確方向的「中性日」，往往是持有現金、等待更強進場信號的最佳時機。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities showed a bifurcated session today, with the tech-heavy NASDAQ eking out a fractional gain of +0.2% while the broader S&P 500 slipped -0.3%, reflecting mixed investor sentiment ahead of upcoming earnings season. The divergence suggests modest rotation out of cyclicals and into selective technology names, but without a clear catalyst to drive conviction. Trading volumes were subdued, consistent with a consolidation day rather than a directional move.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日美股走勢分歧，以科技股為主的那斯達克指數微漲0.2%，而涵蓋範圍更廣的標普500指數則小跌0.3%，反映市場在財報季來臨前情緒複雜。這種分化走勢顯示資金在周期股與科技股之間進行小幅輪動，但缺乏明確催化劑支撐方向性突破。整體成交量偏低，市場進入盤整格局。
